messages.CALIBRATION_FAILED: Calibration failed, faulty gyro or movement during calibration
messages.TEST_PUSH_NOT_STARTED: No push test has been started

app.no_response: No response from device, has it gone into sleep model? No need to refresh the page, just turn on the device again
app.wifi_setup_info: Running in WIFI setup mode. Go to the
app.wifi_setup_suffix: meny and select wifi. Restart device after wifi is configured.
app.wifi_setup_warning: Sensors are not enabled when in wifi setup mode!
app.err_auth_failed: Failed to authenticate with device, please try to reload page!
app.err_load_features: Failed to load feature flags from device, please try to reload page!
app.err_load_status: Failed to load status from device, please try to reload page!
app.err_load_config: Failed to load configuration data from device, please try to reload page!
app.err_load_format: Failed to load format templates from device, please try to reload page!

device_settings.title: Device - Settings
device_settings.mdns_warning: You need to define a mdns name for the device
device_settings.mdns_help: Enter device name used on the network, the suffix .local will be added to this name
device_settings.ota_url_help: Base URL to where firmware and version.json file can be found. Needs to end with '/'', example: http://www.mysite.com/firmware/
device_settings.reporting_found: This device has been reported using {software}.
device_settings.reporting_not_found: This device has not been reported

not_found.message: Page not found! {path} is not a valid URL for this application!

home.no_push_targets: No remote services are active. Check your push settings and enable at least one service.
home.no_gyro: No gyro is detected. Try to reboot / power-off. If this persists, check for hardware issues.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.create_text: Create a backup of the device configuration and store this in a textfile
backup.restore_text: Restore a previous backup of the device configuration by uploading it.
backup.restore_button_title: Upload the configuration to the device
backup.backup_created: Backup file created and downloaded as: {name}
backup.err_no_file_selected: You need to select one file to restore configuration from
backup.err_parse_failed: Unable to parse configuration file for GravityMon.
backup.err_read_failed: Failed to read the backup file

device_gyro.title: Device - Gyro
device_gyro.need_calibration: You need to calibrate the gyro at 90 degrees
device_gyro.gyro_options_help: Select the gyro type used for this board.
device_gyro.filter_help: When active the gyro data will be filtered through a lowpass filter to remove noise ans spikes, applies to ESP32
device_gyro.swap_xy_help: Normally the X asis is used for tilt but some boards have a different orientation and use Y axis instead, applies to ICM42670-p
device_gyro.calibration_help: Shows the current gyro calibraton values, applies to MPU-6050/6500
device_gyro.calibration_not_needed: Calibration not needed for this gyro
device_gyro.err_import: Imported gyro calibration data and formula from old configuration. Please save!

device_hardware.title: Device - Hardware
device_hardware.voltage_calc_info: You can also use the voltage factor calculator under tools
device_hardware.voltage_factor_help: Factor used to calculate the battery voltage. Can vary depending on the R2 value (0 to 6)
device_hardware.voltage_config_help: Over this level the device will always go into configuration mode, some batteries might have a higher voltage when fully charged (3 to 6)
device_hardware.storage_sleep_help: If enabled and the device is placed on its cap (less than 5 degress) it will go into sleep for 2000 minutes
device_hardware.charging_pin_help: If enabled and the device will go into sleep when charging power exceeds 2V on the defined pin and wakeup when power is lost.
device_hardware.battery_saving_help: When active, the sleep interval will be changed to 1 hour when battery drops below 20% (3.73V)
device_hardware.ds18b20_help: Resolution when reading the DS18B20 temperature sensor, higher resolution give better accuracy but takes longer to process and reduces battery life
device_hardware.temp_adjustment_help: Adjustment value for the temperature reading
device_hardware.gyro_temp_help: Use the temperature sensor in the gyro instead of DS18B20, require a minimum 300s update interval to be accurate or the heat from the chip will affect reading
device_hardware.warn_sleep_charging_conflict: Storage sleep and charging pin mode are both enabled, if you want to use the charging pin mode it is recommended to disable storage sleep to avoid conflicts

device_wifi.title: Device - WIFI
device_wifi.scanning: Scanning for wifi networks in range
device_wifi.manual_entry_info: If you have an hidden SSID then you can set it manually
device_wifi.need_network: You need to define at least one wifi network
device_wifi.pass1_help: Enter password for the first wifi network
device_wifi.pass2_help: Enter password for the first wifi network
device_wifi.portal_timeout_help: Max time the wifi portal is idle (10 to 240)
device_wifi.connect_timeout_help: Max time waiting for a wifi connection (1 to 60)
device_wifi.scan_strongest_help: Will do a scan and connect to the strongest AP found (longer connection time)
device_wifi.info_restart_needed: If WIFI settings are changed, restart the device and enter the new URL of the device!

device_wifi2.title: Device - WIFI (Manual)
device_wifi2.need_network: You need to define at least one wifi network
device_wifi2.pass1_help: Enter password for the first wifi network
device_wifi2.pass2_help: Enter password for the first wifi network
device_wifi2.portal_timeout_help: Max time the wifi portal is idle (10 to 240)
device_wifi2.connect_timeout_help: Max time waiting for a wifi connection (1 to 60)
device_wifi2.scan_strongest_help: Will do a scan and connect to the strongest AP found (longer connection time)
device_wifi2.info_restart_needed: If WIFI settings are changed, restart the device and enter the new URL of the device!

gravity_settings.title: Gravity - Settings
gravity_settings.temp_adjust_help: Adjust the calculated gravity based on the current temperature. Assumes that calibration is done using 20C / 68F
gravity_settings.cal_temp_help: Calibration temperature, used in temperatur correction formula, default 20C/68F
gravity_settings.ignore_low_help: When active, angles below water will be ignored. Note! Angle must be defined under calibration, first field.
gravity_settings.gyro_reads_help: How many times should we read the gyro to get an accurate angle. More reads = better accuracy but higher battery drain
gravity_settings.gyro_threshold_help: How much deviation between gyro reads are acceptable in order to regard this as a valid angle

gravity_formula.title: Gravity - Formula
gravity_formula.need_formula: You need to enter a formula in order to report gravity
gravity_formula.formula_help: Formula used to convert angle to gravity. If created outside Gravitymon the formula needs to be created for Specific Gravity!
gravity_formula.data_label: Data for gravity calculation (Angle and Gravity)
gravity_formula.data_help: Enter the data that is used to create a new formula. The most optimal formula will be selected and also validated towards these values.
gravity_formula.max_deviation_help: When validating the derived formula this is the maximum accepted deviation for the supplied values, use graph below to visually check where there are deviations
gravity_formula.decimals_help: How many decimals to try to limit in the formula
gravity_formula.warn_no_formula: No formula defined. Please enter a formula first.
gravity_formula.generated_datapoints: Generated {count} data points for formula validation

firmware.title: Firmware Upload
firmware.select_info: Selet the firmware file that matches your device. Platform:
firmware.select_file_help: Choose the firmware file (.bin) that will be used to update the device. The upload button will be enabled once a file is selected.
firmware.select_first_title: Please select a firmware file first
firmware.update_title: Update the device with the selected firmware
firmware.err_no_file: You need to select one file with firmware to upload
firmware.upload_success: File upload completed, waiting for device to restart before doing refresh!

support.title: Links and device logs
support.intro: If you need support, want to discuss the software or request any new features you can do that on github.com or homebrewtalk.com.
support.log_hint: Starts with the latest log entry first.

push_common.http_url_help: URL to push target, use format http://servername.com/resource (Supports http and https)
push_common.server_help: IP and port to push target, use format server:port
push_common.header2_help: Set a http headers, empty string is skipped, example: Content-Type: application/json
push_common.skip_interval_help: Defines how many sleep cycles to skip between pushing data to this target, 1 = every second cycle. Default is 0.
push_common.data_format_help: Format template used to create the data sent to the remote service

push_settings.title: Push - Settings
push_settings.warn_short_interval: A sleep-interval of less than 300 will reduce battery life, consider using 900
push_settings.warn_gyro_temp_interval: When using gyro temperature is used, select a sleep-interval that is greater than 300 for accurate readings
push_settings.token_help: Token can be used in the format template as a variable, some services use this for authentication
push_settings.sleep_interval_help: The number of seconds that the device will sleep between gravity readings. Recommended value is 300s
push_settings.battery_life_help: Estimated based on current platform, 2200mAh battery and 5 seconds runtime
push_settings.push_timeout_help: The number of seconds that the device will wait until a remote service accepts the connection
push_settings.skip_ssl_label: Skip SSL post in config mode
push_settings.skip_ssl_help: Don't do SSL when running in configuration mode, on ESP8266 this can cause the device to crash due to low memory, only applies to ESP8266

push_wifi_direct.title: Push - Wifi Direct
push_wifi_direct.intro: Using the WIFI direct feature means that the device will connect to the AP and send data using HTTP post to the Gravitymon Gateway.
push_wifi_direct.ssid_help: Enter the SSID for the wifi direct functionallity
push_wifi_direct.pass_help: Enter password for the wifi direct network
push_wifi_direct.use_label: Use wifi direct in gravity mode
push_wifi_direct.use_help: In gravity mode the wifi direct SSID/Password will be used for connection
push_wifi_direct.err_missing_credentials: SSID and Password are required when using wifi direct

push_http_post1.title: Push - HTTP Post #1
push_http_post1.err_server_port_format: Server must be in format hostname:port or ip:port

push_influxdb.title: Push - Influxdb v2
push_influxdb.org_help: Identifier to what organisation to use
push_influxdb.bucket_help: Identifier for the data bucket to use
push_influxdb.token_help: Authentication token for accessing data bucket

push_mqtt.title: Push - MQTT
push_mqtt.server_help: Name of server to connect to, use format servername.com
push_mqtt.port_help: Port number: 1883 (standard), 8883 (standard SSL), or 8000+ for SSL. Leave 0 for default.
push_mqtt.user_help: Username to use. Leave blank if authentication is disabled
push_mqtt.pass_help: Password to use. Leave blank if authentication is disabled
push_mqtt.warn_esp8266_payload: On an ESP8266 a large payload will likely cause a crash due to RAM limitations on device. Reduce your template.
push_mqtt.err_server_required: Server name or IP is required
push_mqtt.err_server_format: Invalid server name or IP format
push_mqtt.err_gravity_test: Failed to start push test for gravity data
push_mqtt.err_pressure_test: Failed to start push test for pressure data

push_bluetooth.title: Push - Bluetooth
push_bluetooth.tilt_color_help: Tilt color beacon. Only used when tilt type is selected.
push_bluetooth.format_help: Select the type of bluetooth transmission used.
push_bluetooth.restart_hint: Changing bluetooth settings might require a restart to function properly
push_bluetooth.not_available: Bluetooth is not available on this platform

fragment_voltage.title: Calculate a new voltage factor
fragment_voltage.measured_help: Enter the measured voltage on the device
fragment_voltage.info_new_factor: New factor applied, check if the current battery reading is correct

fragment_list_files.usage_text: Total space {total}, Free space {free}, Used space {used}

fragment_advanced_files.select_file_help: Choose a file to upload to the file system
fragment_advanced_files.update_title: Update the device with the selected firmware
fragment_advanced_files.delete_title_sd: Delete files from SD file system
fragment_advanced_files.confirm_delete_message: Do you really want to delete file {file}
fragment_advanced_files.err_no_file: You need to select one file with firmware to upload

fragment_enable_cors.title: Developer settings
fragment_enable_cors.success: CORS enabled in configuration, please reboot to take effect.

fragment_formula.intro: Below is a list of the generated formulas.

fragment_formula_table.intro: Below is a list of calculated values based on the formula options, devaition from input value is also shown.

fragment_formula_graph.intro: Below is a graphical representation of the formula options, click on the color to deselect one or more of the formulas. If you dont see more than one, try to reduce the deviation to dismiss invalid formulas.

fragment_gravity_graph.intro: Below is a graphical representation of the current formula and data points for formula creation.

fragment_register_calibration.title: Report calibration data
fragment_register_calibration.intro: Do you want to help to identify improvements connected to device calibration please report your data points. Its possible to report data multiple times if you improve your data points. This is the data that will be sent and its anonymized. The chipid is a hash (SHA256) of the actual chip ID to ensure privacy.
fragment_register_calibration.cancel_hint: Cancel will close the dialog without action.
fragment_register_calibration.send_hint: Send will send the data above to the collection service.
fragment_register_calibration.err_401: Reporting failed: API key has been revoked. Please update to a newer software version to report data.
fragment_register_calibration.err_429: Reporting failed: Registration API is currently unavailable, please try again later.
fragment_register_calibration.err_500: Reporting failed: Internal server error, please try again later.

fragment_register_device.title: Report usage
fragment_register_device.intro: Do you want to help me determine what boards and configurations are used for this project so I can better focus on those going forward. This is the data that will be sent and its anonymized. The chipid is a hash (SHA256) of the actual chip ID to ensure privacy.
fragment_register_device.cancel_hint: Cancel will close the dialog without action.
fragment_register_device.ignore_hint: Ignore will not prompt you again on this device, but you want this can be triggered from the device settings page.
fragment_register_device.send_hint: Send will send the data above to the collection service.
fragment_register_device.err_401: Registration failed: API key has been revoked. Please update to a newer software version to register.
fragment_register_device.err_429: Registration failed: Registration API is currently unavailable, please try again later.
fragment_register_device.err_500: Registration failed: Internal server error, please try again later.
